items.title: Cohere Command R: enterprise retrieval and RAG
items.summary: Cohere positioned Command R around enterprise retrieval and grounded generation workflows.

items.title: ElevenLabs Eleven v3: next-generation voice synthesis
items.summary: ElevenLabs released an updated voice model focused on expressiveness and production-ready latency.

model-releases-benchmarks.name: Model Releases and Benchmarks
model-releases-benchmarks.commentary: Model Releases and Benchmarks contains 4 tracked update(s) in this edition.

items.title: OpenAI introduces GPT-4o mini
items.summary: OpenAI released GPT-4o mini, a smaller and cheaper variant of GPT-4o targeting cost-sensitive production use cases. The model delivers strong performance on text and vision tasks at a fraction of the cost of the full GPT-4o, making it viable for high-volume applications.

items.title: Anthropic introduces Claude 3.5 Sonnet
items.summary: Anthropic released Claude 3.5 Sonnet with stronger coding and reasoning performance while keeping Sonnet-tier latency and cost characteristics.

items.title: DeepMind Gemini 1.5 Pro: long-context capabilities
items.summary: Google DeepMind expanded long-context model capabilities for large-document and codebase reasoning use cases.

items.title: xAI Grok-2 model release
items.summary: xAI launched Grok-2 with improved reasoning and multimodal behavior, plus a lighter mini variant.

items.title: Eugene Yan: a practical guide to LLM evaluators
items.summary: A practical framework for evaluating LLM outputs with robust anti-bias and calibration guidance.
